channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped bed frames, 30th June
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 29/06/26 20:21 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.425472, -0.0319136 what3words - ground.plant.those Nearest address - Unit C, Broomsleigh Business Park, Worsley Bridge Road, Bellingham, London, SE26 5BN Dumped bed frames Worsley bridge road Reference - 5681838 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 29/06/2026 20:20 Dumped bed frames Worsley bridge road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Bag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, possibly stolen, 30th June
item.description:
Saturday 27 June approx 5.30, the Mini with 2 occupants parked in street parking bay. Occupants got out and sat on neighbours garden wall and made phone calls. After 15 mins a large silver SUV arrived and collected the 2 occupants and drove off. 3 days later mini is still there. The Mini arrived withi a yellow parking ticket under the wiper, the driver of the Mini touched this but left it in place. Possibly a stolen vehicle abandoned.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Luxfield Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th June
item.description:
This is the 2nd time of reporting this incident

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orangery Lane, Eltham

item.title: Overgrown tree and low hanging branches outside 27 Osborne Road, 30th June
item.description:
The tree outside my property (27 Osborne Road) is overgrown and pretruding onto my driveway. The low branches are touching my car pn my driveway and causing my car to become sticky and covered in pollen from the tree. The leaves around the tree trunk and also blocking the path, forcing people to walk on my drive to get around. I have reported this problem twice already and nothing has been done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Osborne Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brown bin collection Priestfield Road, 30th June
item.description:
Why are the brown bin operatives now leaving the bins in the road after being emptied when they were never found there in the first place. I appreciate they are busy but it makes an already narrow road even narrow. Please request that they always return them to the pavement where they found them. Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Priestfield Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 30th June
item.description:
Please empty this bin more often as it is smelly and full.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cow Path, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown public tree resting on roof, 30th June
item.description:
The overgrown tree is resting on the roof of 59 leading to 57 Rookery Gardens BR5 4BA. This is a terraced property and we are concerned of the tree growth as its branches are already resting on roof affecting shared roof and tiles. Please cut back or uproot urgently before causing further damage. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal in bin liner on road, 30th June
item.description:
Walked past it today- very offensive smell
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street bin overflowing. Smells terrible due to loads of dog waste., 30th June
item.description:
Bin by bus stop at Elsa Road junction with Avondale Road. Overflowing again! Only been there a few weeks. Needs emptying more often as dog walkers fill it up with dog waste which smells terrible. Now dumping on top and beside of bin. Please clear asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsa Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin Overflowing, 30th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ana dined can picked up with rubbish behind it, spilling onto pavement, 30th June
item.description:
Van has been there for weeks and it’s now got a lot of polystyrene litter stacked around it. Getting more litter added gradually. That alleyway is always used as a dumping ground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Russell Lane, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish and general household furniture on the pavement, 30th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridge Way, Crayford, Greater London

item.title: By bus stand Claremont road, 30th June
item.description:
Lots of litter on pavement from top to end next to bus stand - this needs a thorough sweep and deep clean (jet wash) all the rubbish around the edges by fence and around bus stop sign needs to be picked up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
